accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and the named statutes are correctly identified.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims; statutory references and provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs removal of U.S. forces from unauthorized hostilities with Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes it invokes existing War Powers procedures rather than amending law, which fits this resolution's nature.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately captures the rule-of-construction carve-outs for defense, intelligence, and assistance to partners.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the February 28, 2026 reference date tied to partner attacks; no other timing provisions exist.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the directive, findings, statutory procedures, and exceptions.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Appropriately detailed without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: All named statutes and entities are identified correctly.

correct_figures.why: The only date cited, February 28, 2026, matches the bill text.
